prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of META stock, which typically exhibits annual volatility around 35-40%. For a 21-day period, this translates to approximately 7-9% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes slight positive drift consistent with long-term equity returns. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions around the geometric Brownian motion model, with wider intervals reflecting the inherent uncertainty in short-term stock price movements.
